ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-02-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-02-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Continued To Mar-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that we are here for status of filing an inventory & appraisal, that an inventory was filed but the vehicle identified was not appraised and that there is no one present to explain. An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator Abigael Santiago and the Attorney Dae Hee Kim to appear on March 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the corrected inventory has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date and will go off calendar if the document is filed in advance.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Continued To Feb-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James McElroy specially appearing for Dae Hee Kim for (petitioner) Abigail Santiago.

The Court stated that it is prepared to waive notice. Mr. McElroy stated that they would like to ask for bond to be waived, that there will be issues with obtaining a bond for Ms. Santiago and that the funds are going to the minor children and will need to be placed in a blocked account. The Court asked about the car. Mr. McElroy stated that it will be changed into Ms. Santiago's name. The petition for spousal property and the petition for letters of administration were taken under submission. Counsel is to provide a proposed order to the court.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
